initiatives.name: Hear Her Voice
initiatives.description: Amplifying the voices of incarcerated women and building support networks for families affected by incarceration.

initiatives.name: ETC
initiatives.description: A community space and cooperative fostering mutual aid through accessible education, arts programming, and cultural events. They provide a hub for community organizing, skill-sharing, and building solidarity while supporting local artists and grassroots initiatives.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs Greensboro
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective fostering food justice and community solidarity through free food sharing in Greensboro. They coordinate regular meal distributions, food recovery initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through direct action, community care, and creating spaces for food sovereignty and collective nourishment.

initiatives.name: NC Reproductive Care Coalition
initiatives.description: A mutual aid coalition dedicated to bringing reproductive liberation to our community through practices of care & hope.
